messages.content: bash cmds/sglang_launch_server.sh -m go-sft-0912-14k-025 -p llmbr_gpu -n 1--tool-call-parser qwen --reasoning-parser qwen3

Your command is being parsed as:

- `bash cmds/sglang_launch_server.sh`
- `-m go-sft-0912-14k-025`
- `-p llmbr_gpu`
- `-n 1--tool-call-parser qwen --reasoning-parser qwen3`

The problem is that `-n` and `1` got glued to the next flag (`--tool-call-parser`) because there’s no space/newline between `1` and `--tool-call-parser`.

Use:

```bash
bash cmds/sglang_launch_server.sh \
  -m go-sft-0912-14k-025 \
  -p llmbr_gpu \
  -n 1 \
  --tool-call-parser qwen \
  --reasoning-parser qwen3
```

If your script expects these flags to be passed through to an underlying `python -m sglang...` command, and it uses something like `getopts`, note that `getopts` won’t handle long options (`--tool-call-parser`) unless the script explicitly supports them. If it errors even after fixing spacing, paste the script’s usage/help output or the error message and I’ll adjust the invocation accordingly.

(sglang) hezhishu@hezhishu-dev2:/mnt/shared-storage-user/llmbr-share/hezhishu/cargoflow$  bash cmds/sglang_launch_server.sh -m go-sft-0912-14k-025 -p llmbr_gpu -n 1--tool-call-parser qwen --reasoning-parser qwen3
cmds/sglang_launch_server.sh: line 91: ((: i<=1--tool-call-parser: syntax error in expression (error token is "--tool-call-parser")为什么

因为你把参数粘在一起了：`-n 1--tool-call-parser` 这一段里，`1` 后面少了一个空格，导致脚本把 `-n` 的值解析成了字符串 `1--tool-call-parser`。

而 `sglang_launch_server.sh` 里第 91 行大概率在做类似这种算术循环/判断：

```bash
(( i <= $NUM_GPUS ))
```

当 `NUM_GPUS` 变成了 `1--tool-call-parser` 这种“非数字”，Bash 的算术表达式就会报：

```
((: i<=1--tool-call-parser: syntax error in expression
```

解决：把参数写成分开的（注意 `1` 和 `--tool-call-parser` 之间要有空格）：

```bash
bash cmds/sglang_launch_server.sh \
  -m go-sft-0912-14k-025 \
  -p llmbr_gpu \
  -n 1 \
  --tool-call-parser qwen \
  --reasoning-parser qwen3
```

如果你加了空格后仍然报错，原因可能是这个脚本不支持 `--tool-call-parser/--reasoning-parser` 这种“长参数”（很多脚本用 `getopts` 只能解析 `-m -p -n` 这种短参数）。  
你把 `cmds/sglang_launch_server.sh` 里 **第 70~110 行**（尤其是参数解析部分）或运行 `bash cmds/sglang_launch_server.sh -h` 的输出贴出来，我可以告诉你这些长参数应该怎么传（比如是否要用某个 `--extra-args "..."` 之类的入口）。
